response.justification: Candidate has 15+ years of broad full-stack experience, recent Staff title at Acme with AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling exposure, and prior work on high-throughput microservices at Dunnhumby/Sociomantic. However, Python is conspicuously absent from the skills list and employment history — the role requires strong Python as a must-have. Distributed systems depth exists but is dated (2018-2020), and stakeholder/technical-strategy scope is not clearly evidenced. Worth a screening call to probe Python proficiency and recent distributed-systems work before committing.
strengths: Recent hands-on AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code-generator work at Acme aligns with the AI-native engineering mindset requirement
Prior high-throughput distributed systems experience at Dunnhumby/Sociomantic handling millions of req/sec
Strong software craftsmanship background — TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, plus teaching/workshop experience signaling systems thinking
concerns: Python is missing from the skills list and employment history despite being a must-have for the role
Distributed-systems experience is concentrated 2018-2020; recent roles lean toward TypeScript/Node product work rather than high-throughput architecture
Resume shows no explicit evidence of technical-strategy leadership, cross-functional stakeholder management, or on-call/incident-response ownership at Staff scope
